name: DataImpulse
description: DataImpulse reseller API for managing residential/datacenter proxy sub-users, balances, access controls, protocols, pool defaults, and usage. This API requires approved reseller access; ordinary proxy credentials are configured in the DataImpulse dashboard and are not REST API tokens.

credential_fields.name: token
credential_fields.label: Reseller API token
credential_fields.description: Temporary bearer token from the DataImpulse reseller API/dashboard. Reseller approval and KYC are required.

tools.name: get_reseller_balance
tools.description: Get the reseller account balance. This is the read-only connection check.

tools.name: list_sub_users
tools.description: List every proxy sub-user owned by this reseller account.

tools.name: get_sub_user
tools.description: Get one sub-user, including its proxy credentials and configuration where returned by DataImpulse.

tools.name: create_sub_user
tools.description: Create a proxy sub-user. The response contains the generated credentials; retain them securely. sticky_range reserves ports and threads sets the concurrency limit.

tools.name: update_sub_user
tools.description: Update a sub-user label, sticky port range, or thread limit. Send only fields that should change.

tools.name: delete_sub_user
tools.description: Permanently delete a proxy sub-user. Confirm the subuser_id with get_sub_user first; deleted credentials stop working.

tools.name: reset_sub_user_password
tools.description: Rotate a sub-user proxy password. Existing clients immediately need the new password returned by this call.

tools.name: set_sub_user_blocked
tools.description: Enable or disable all proxy access for a sub-user.

tools.name: add_allowed_ip
tools.description: Allow a source IP to authenticate for a sub-user.

tools.name: remove_allowed_ip
tools.description: Remove a source IP from a sub-user's allowlist.

tools.name: get_sub_user_balance
tools.description: Get a sub-user's remaining traffic balance.

tools.name: add_sub_user_balance
tools.description: Allocate traffic from the reseller account to a sub-user. This changes billable balance; traffic is measured in DataImpulse's documented traffic units.

tools.name: drop_sub_user_balance
tools.description: Drop/reset the sub-user's allocated traffic balance. This is destructive; inspect balance and history first.

tools.name: get_balance_addition_history
tools.description: List traffic additions made to a sub-user.

tools.name: get_sub_user_usage
tools.description: Get summarized usage for a sub-user over a supported period.

tools.name: get_sub_user_usage_detail
tools.description: Get paginated detailed usage rows for a sub-user.

tools.name: get_sub_user_usage_errors
tools.description: Get paginated proxy request errors for a sub-user and period.

tools.name: get_supported_protocols
tools.description: Get enabled proxy protocols for a sub-user.

tools.name: set_supported_protocols
tools.description: Replace the enabled protocols for a sub-user.

tools.name: set_blocked_hosts
tools.description: Replace the host blocklist for a sub-user. Pass an empty array to clear it.

tools.name: set_default_pool_parameters
tools.description: Set default country, anonymity, and rotation behavior for a sub-user's proxy pool.

tools.name: list_locations
tools.description: List locations available for a proxy pool type before setting country targeting.

tools.name: get_pool_stats
tools.description: Get current capacity/statistics for a proxy pool type.
